description: Single-call translation path: translates English description and parameter values into Polish and writes description_pl + parameters.valuesByLanguage.pl.
name: Translation EN->PL Description + Parameters

nodes.description: Resolve product context and entity payload.
nodes.title: Context Filter

nodes.description: Extract source English description + parameters into one bundle.
nodes.title: JSON Parser

prompt.template:
You are a strict EN->PL translator for ecommerce data.
Translate only the provided English text into Polish.

SOURCE JSON:
{{bundle}}

Expected output: return ONLY valid JSON object with this exact shape:
{"description_pl":"","parameters":[{"parameterId":"","value":"","valuesByLanguage":{"pl":""}}]}

Rules:
1) No markdown, no commentary, JSON only.
2) description_pl must be translation of source description: prefer content_en; if empty use description_en.
3) parameters array must preserve order and parameterId from input parameters.
4) Keep each parameter value field as source English base value (from valuesByLanguage.en if present, otherwise value).
5) Put Polish translation into valuesByLanguage.pl.
6) If valuesByLanguage.pl already exists and is non-empty, keep it unchanged.
7) For purely numeric/code/unit-like values (e.g. 12V, 42, XL, SKU codes), keep PL text same as source.
8) If no translatable source exists, output empty string for that pl value.

nodes.description: Single-call deterministic translator for description + parameters.
nodes.title: Prompt

nodes.description: Extract JSON object from model output.
nodes.title: Regex JSON Extract

nodes.description: Persist description_pl and translated parameter valuesByLanguage.pl.
nodes.title: Database Query

nodes.description: Inspect translation payload and write result.
nodes.title: Result Viewer

nodes.description: Simulate a modal action by Entity ID.
nodes.title: Simulation: Entity Modal
